news.t: Capital Group Launches 7 New ETFs on the New York Stock Exchange

overview.description: The Capital Group International Bond ETF (USD-Hedged) (CGIB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund seeks a high-level of current income and capital preservation by actively investing in global debt securities with broad credit ratings and maturities. CGIB was launched on Jun 25, 2024 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: Capital Group Launches 7 New ETFs on the New York Stock Exchange
data.text: New services include four equity and three fixed income ETFs, bringing Capital Group's ETF platform to 21 LOS ANGELES, June 27, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Capital Group has introduced seven new active, tran...
